{"tags": "", "email": "jon@mail.openhouseboise.net", "country": "US", "message": {"body": "Hi Carolyn,

I'm Jon, part of Luke Gilbert's real estate team. Luke Gilbert and I want to make sure you have a direct line to someone on the
team if anything real estate comes up.

From time to time, I'll send along anything worth knowing... market shifts, opportunities, or just useful context as things
evolve. Nothing you need to do, just making sure you're always in the loop.

Luke Gilbert is CC'd, so feel free to reach out to either of us.

- Jon"}, "location": {"id": "kv1Af9i1qYK7KfIiT0U3",

contact.Since this is the outbound message and there's no actual reply from the lead yet, there's nothing to respond to.

Staying sil
